headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on PPG Indus, Lowers Price Target to $110
summary: UBS  analyst Joshua Spector   maintains PPG Indus (NYSE:PPG) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $122 to $110.

headline: RPM Expands Building Envelope Portfolio: Is Kalzip a Game Changer?
summary: RPM International expands its building envelope portfolio with Kalzip acquisition, boosting global reach and shifting toward higher-margin, engineered systems.
